headline: NKE, LULU, UAA, VFC Stocks In Focus: Apparel Giants Lose Billions As Once-Strong Brands Fight For A Comeback
summary: Apparel giants face declines as weak demand, tariffs, excess inventory and restructuring challenges pressure the industry.
